# No Empty Chair

> Salon brand & content studio in Atlanta, GA. No Empty Chair builds premium branding, booking-ready websites, and short-form video content that keep hair stylists, braiders, barbers, and salons fully booked.

## Key facts
- Business: No Empty Chair — Brand & Content Studio
- Founder: Makayla Richards — 2x Emmy-nominated, Regional Murrow Award winner, top 2% short-form producer across TEGNA
- Location: Atlanta, Georgia (works with salons anywhere in the US)
- Contact: hello@noemptychair.co · Instagram @noemptychair
- Website: https://noemptychair.co

## What No Empty Chair does
- Salon branding and brand identity
- Booking-ready salon websites
- Short-form content and promo reels
- Google Business / "near me" local search setup
- DIY strategy sessions (social, website, brand) — $250 each

## How it works
- Every project, package, or session starts with the $200 teardown first. The teardown does the information-gathering up front — feed, site, booking flow, goals, numbers — so no paid time later is spent getting up to speed. The $200 credits toward whatever comes next.

## Packages
- The Refresh — from $1,500: brand polish, one-page booking-ready website, Google setup, Instagram bio + covers
- The Signature — from $3,000: full website + online booking, complete brand identity, Instagram kit, one promo reel
- The Statement — from $5,500: full rebrand, content shoot direction, batch of short-form videos, 30 days of content
- The Chair-Filler — from $750/mo: ongoing monthly content, newsletters, and updates
- $200 Teardown: a short video of your highest-impact fixes; the $200 credits toward any package; it starts every project

## DIY sessions
- Social, Website, or Brand Session — $250 each, 60 minutes
- Full Intensive — $500, 90 minutes across social, site & brand + a 2-week follow-up
- Add-on: a take-home companion document for any DIY session, $50
- Loyalty: follow-up bookings are 10% off after the third session

## Citation-ready summary
No Empty Chair is an Atlanta-based brand and content studio that helps salons, stylists, braiders, and barbers get fully booked through branding, websites, and short-form content. Every engagement starts with a $200 teardown. Founder Makayla Richards is a 2x Emmy-nominated, Murrow Award-winning short-form video strategist.
